mapper.sql: credential.id, credential.tenant_id, binding.provider_channel_id, credential.name, credential.credential_type, credential.masked_value, credential.enabled, credential.priority, credential.weight, credential.remark, credential.created_at, credential.updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO provider_channel_credential(tenant_id,provider_channel_id,provider_credential_id,enabled,created_at,updated_at) VALUES(#{tenantId},#{channelId},#{credentialId},TRUE,NOW(),NOW()) ON CONFLICT (provider_channel_id,provider_credential_id) WHERE deleted_at IS NULL DO NOTHING
mapper.select:
INSERT INTO provider_credential(tenant_id,name,credential_type,masked_value,credential_fingerprint, ciphertext,initialization_vector,encryption_version,enabled,priority,weight,remark,created_at,updated_at) VALUES
(#{item.tenantId},#{item.name},#{item.credentialType},#{item.maskedValue},#{item.credentialFingerprint}, #{item.ciphertext},#{item.initializationVector},#{item.encryptionVersion},#{item.enabled},#{item.priority},#{item.weight},#{item.remark},NOW(),NOW())
ON CONFLICT (tenant_id,credential_fingerprint) WHERE deleted_at IS NULL DO NOTHING RETURNING id,credential_fingerprint
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO provider_channel_credential(tenant_id,provider_channel_id,provider_credential_id,enabled,created_at,updated_at) VALUES
(#{tenantId},#{channelId},#{credential.id},TRUE,NOW(),NOW())
ON CONFLICT (provider_channel_id,provider_credential_id) WHERE deleted_at IS NULL DO NOTHING
mapper.select: SELECT credential.id, credential.tenant_id, (SELECT binding.provider_channel_id FROM provider_channel_credential binding WHERE binding.provider_credential_id=credential.id AND binding.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY binding.id LIMIT 1) AS provider_channel_id, credential.name,credential.credential_type,credential.masked_value,credential.enabled,credential.priority, credential.weight,credential.remark,credential.created_at,credential.updated_at FROM provider_credential credential WHERE credential.id=#{id} AND credential.deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT credential.id, credential.tenant_id, (SELECT binding.provider_channel_id FROM provider_channel_credential binding WHERE binding.provider_credential_id=credential.id AND binding.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY binding.id LIMIT 1) AS provider_channel_id, credential.name,credential.credential_type,credential.masked_value,credential.credential_fingerprint, credential.ciphertext,credential.initialization_vector,credential.encryption_version,credential.enabled, credential.priority,credential.weight,credential.remark,credential.deleted_at,credential.created_at,credential.updated_at FROM provider_credential credential WHERE credential.id=#{id} AND credential.deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT , credential.credential_fingerprint,credential.ciphertext, credential.initialization_vector,credential.encryption_version,credential.deleted_at FROM provider_channel_credential binding JOIN provider_credential credential ON credential.id=binding.provider_credential_id WHERE binding.provider_channel_id=#{channelId} AND binding.enabled=TRUE AND binding.deleted_at IS NULL AND credential.enabled=TRUE AND credential.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY credential.priority,credential.id LIMIT 1

SELECT FROM provider_channel_credential binding JOIN provider_credential credential ON credential.id=binding.provider_credential_id WHERE binding.provider_channel_id=#{channelId} AND binding.deleted_at IS NULL AND credential.deleted_at IS NULL AND credential.name ILIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%') AND credential.masked_value ILIKE CONCAT('%',#{maskedValue},'%') AND credential.enabled=#{enabled} AND binding.enabled=#{enabled} ORDER BY credential.created_at DESC,credential.id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM provider_channel_credential binding JOIN provider_credential credential ON credential.id=binding.provider_credential_id WHERE binding.provider_channel_id=#{channelId} AND binding.deleted_at IS NULL AND credential.deleted_at IS NULL AND credential.name ILIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%') AND credential.masked_value ILIKE CONCAT('%',#{maskedValue},'%') AND credential.enabled=#{enabled} AND binding.enabled=#{enabled}

SELECT credential.id, credential.tenant_id, (SELECT binding.provider_channel_id FROM provider_channel_credential binding WHERE binding.provider_credential_id=credential.id AND binding.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY binding.id LIMIT 1) AS provider_channel_id, credential.name,credential.credential_type,credential.masked_value,credential.enabled,credential.priority, credential.weight,credential.remark,credential.created_at,credential.updated_at FROM provider_credential credential WHERE credential.tenant_id=#{tenantId} AND credential.credential_fingerprint=#{fingerprint} AND credential.deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM provider_channel_credential WHERE provider_channel_id=#{channelId} AND provider_credential_id=#{credentialId} AND deleted_at IS NULL)
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM provider_channel_credential WHERE provider_credential_id=#{credentialId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE provider_channel_credential SET enabled=#{enabled},updated_at=NOW() WHERE provider_channel_id=#{channelId} AND provider_credential_id=#{credentialId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE provider_channel_credential SET deleted_at=NOW(),enabled=FALSE,updated_at=NOW() WHERE provider_channel_id=#{channelId} AND provider_credential_id=#{credentialId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE provider_credential SET name=#{name},enabled=#{enabled},priority=#{priority},weight=#{weight},remark=#{remark},updated_at=NOW() WHERE id=#{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL

UPDATE provider_credential SET masked_value=#{maskedValue},credential_fingerprint=#{credentialFingerprint},ciphertext=#{ciphertext},initialization_vector=#{initializationVector},encryption_version=#{encryptionVersion},credential_version=credential_version+1,updated_at=NOW() WHERE id=#{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE provider_credential SET enabled=#{enabled},credential_version=credential_version+1,updated_at=NOW() WHERE id=#{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE provider_credential SET deleted_at=NOW(),credential_version=credential_version+1,updated_at=NOW(),enabled=FALSE WHERE id=#{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE credential.enabled=TRUE AND binding.enabled=TRUE) AS enabled, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE credential.enabled=FALSE OR binding.enabled=FALSE) AS disabled FROM provider_channel_credential binding JOIN provider_credential credential ON credential.id=binding.provider_credential_id WHERE binding.provider_channel_id=#{channelId} AND binding.deleted_at IS NULL AND credential.deleted_at IS NULL
